args: cd /etc/kryonix && uv run --project packages/kryonix-brain-lightrag python -m kryonix_brain_lightrag.server
kryonix-brain.description: Recommended Brain MCP path for client hosts: run the MCP server on Glacier through SSH. For HTTP proxy mode, set KRYONIX_BRAIN_API=http://glacier:8000 in the client environment.

mcp-nixos.description: Query NixOS packages, options, Home Manager, nix-darwin, flakes

vault-readonly.description: Read-only access to Obsidian vault (IMPORTANT: must be absolute path, e.g. /home/user/kryonix-vault)

github.description: GitHub issues, PRs, commits, file access (IMPORTANT: set token in .env, not here)
